verbGlossary.ORIGINATES IN: {source} begins its document or deliverable lifecycle in this draft {target} before any formal review.
verbGlossary.CIRCULATES THROUGH: {source} deliverables pass through this review {target} as reviewers examine and comment on the work product.
verbGlossary.RETURNS TO: {source} deliverable is sent back to {target} for correction when reviewers identify issues.
verbGlossary.ROUTES THROUGH: {source} follows {target} pattern as its deliverables move through the review and approval process.
verbGlossary.FILED AT: {source} deliverable is formally submitted or filed for record at {target}, initiating official review.
verbGlossary.CLEARED UPON: {source} regulatory or compliance gate is cleared when {target} is achieved, allowing construction to proceed.
verbGlossary.DENIED AT: {source} submission is rejected at {target}, requiring rework or additional documentation before resubmission.
verbGlossary.LOCKED UPON: {source} output values become fixed and read-only once {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.ESTABLISHES: {source} creates and sets the baseline values tracked in this financial {target} stage.
verbGlossary.TENDERED AT: {source}are formally submitted by subcontractors at {target} during the procurement phase.
verbGlossary.EVALUATED DURING: {source}are scored and compared during this review {target}.
verbGlossary.AWARDED UPON: {source}is awarded to the selected bidder when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {source} is constrained by {target} component, such as a contractual or delivery deadline.
verbGlossary.CONDITIONALLY ACCEPTED AT: {source}submittal is accepted with notations or conditions that must be addressed during fabrication or installation.
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source} item automatically transitions to {target} when its deadline is missed.
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source} {target} efficiency is quantified using this standard performance measure.
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED VIA: Responsibility for advancing {target} deliverable is routed to a specific party through this ball-in-court mechanism.
verbGlossary.ADVANCES TO: {source} transitions forward into this active {target} as field work progresses.
verbGlossary.STALLED AT: {source} is paused at this hold {target} due to material delays, weather, or other blocking conditions.
verbGlossary.INITIATES AT: {source} opens its first work items or tracking records at {target}, beginning active work.
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED FOR: {source} completed work is formally presented for field inspection at this ready-for-review {target}.
verbGlossary.PASSES AT: {source}inspected work meets requirements and receives this conforming disposition {target}.
verbGlossary.FAILS AT: {source}inspected work does not meet requirements and receives this deficient disposition {target}, requiring correction.
verbGlossary.VERIFIED THROUGH: {source} completed work is checked and verified through this field inspection {target} pattern.
verbGlossary.COORDINATED THROUGH: Multiple trades coordinate their work routing within {target} using this review-and-respond workflow pattern.
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED THROUGH: {source} progresses through discrete {target}s in a defined order to ensure systematic completion.
verbGlossary.CERTIFIED UPON: {source} performance results are formally certified and accepted at {target}.
verbGlossary.COMPLETED AT: {source} reaches its terminal closed {target}, indicating all work items and deliverables are finished.
verbGlossary.FOLLOWS: {source} adheres to this standard {target} pattern from initiation through completion.
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source} overall progress toward completion is monitored using {target} KPI.
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES VIA: {source} obtains formal execution or authentication through {target}.
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: {source} activates {target} escalation mechanism when issues arise that require elevated attention.
